summary: A solid Andrew F. recording that remains great despite not being the absolute best of his series.
review: The reviewer rates this tape a full five stars, placing it in Andrew F.'s string of high‑quality recordings. While they note it isn’t quite as spectacular as the previous show, the overall impression is that both the performance and the capture are enjoyable. No specific song or technical details are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Single enthusiastic five‑star review praising the recording overall, but lacking detail on performance or sound quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it part of a series of great recordings by Andrew F., implying decent sound, but provides no concrete technical commentary.
